prompt: Restyle the text in the source image to use the exact letterforms, stroke weight, edge texture, and letter spacing of the reference. Preserve the source composition and content, replacing only the typography so it matches the reference’s handwriting style
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Restyle the white text 'KEEP CALM AND CARRY ON' to match the typographic style of the text in image 2. objects: Text with letterforms inspired by image 2 (e.g., expressive/graffiti-like)
